summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Naija LMS MVP after main agent fixes. All critical features working perfectly including the fixed homepage hero button issue. Backend APIs at 100% success rate, frontend fully functional with proper Nigerian-inspired design.

minor_issues.issue: Logout button not easily discoverable - had to navigate manually to login page

passed_tests: User registration and authentication flow (100% success)
Admin login with admin@naijalms.com / Admin123! works perfectly
Student registration creates account and redirects to dashboard
Student login with test account works correctly
Homepage hero section CTA buttons are now clickable (FIXED)
Homepage Browse Courses button navigates to /courses
Homepage Get Started button navigates to /register
Courses page shows 3 sample courses with Nigerian Naira prices (₦45,000, ₦35,000, ₦25,000)
Course detail page shows learning outcomes and Proceed to Payment button
Admin dashboard accessible with proper stats display
Admin can view courses, payments, students, messages pages
Admin settings page shows bank details configuration
Nigerian-inspired warm orange/gold design implemented correctly
Course cards display with proper pricing and details
Authentication redirects working correctly for both students and admins
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor improvement: Make logout button more discoverable in student dashboard. Consider adding a user menu or making logout more prominent. Overall application is working excellently.
